123 Synthetic St, San Francisco, CA 94110

3 bd | 2.5 ba | 1,800 sqft | Built 1985 | Single Family

Listed at $625,000 — synthetic fixture for INGEST-02 testing.

Days on Zillow: 12. Estimated payment placeholder removed for fixture cleanliness.

About 123 Synthetic St

Synthetic placeholder prose for fixture byte-padding. This text exists solely to push the fixture above the MIN_BODY_BYTES = 5000 threshold so that the block-detection cheap-first ordering in lib.property_block_detector.detect_block does NOT fire body_too_short on this fixture. We want the happy path: status 200, body length above 5000, no captcha phrase, and a present script id=__NEXT_DATA__.

Generic synthetic-listing prose continues. Hardwood floors throughout the living area (placeholder description). Updated kitchen with stainless appliances (placeholder description). Two-car garage with workbench (placeholder description). Backyard with mature landscaping (placeholder description). Walking distance to fixture-village transit stop (placeholder description). Energy-efficient windows installed in fixture year (placeholder description). All numbers and features are illustrative for unit-testing the Phase 13 ingestion pipeline; nothing in this document refers to a real property, real owner, real buyer, real seller, or real listing agent.

School fixture placeholder: Elementary school rating 8/10 (synthetic), Middle school rating 7/10 (synthetic), High school rating 9/10 (synthetic). These ratings exist only to fatten the fixture body past MIN_BODY_BYTES; no inference about a real school system is intended. Phase 14 reference data (Phase 16 plan) will fill in any real per-zip values that the analysis pipeline requires; this fixture only needs to be ingestible.

Neighborhood (synthetic)

Synthetic neighborhood paragraph. Fixture-village is a synthetic neighborhood that exists only inside this HTML file. Quiet streets, placeholder cafe, placeholder park, placeholder community garden. The neighborhood paragraph exists to add bytes to the fixture body so the block-detection threshold check passes. No real-world inference about any real San Francisco neighborhood is intended; the 94110 ZIP is preserved so downstream Phase 14 per-zip tax-rate lookups can run their normal code path against a real ZIP.

Walkability synthetic score: 78/100. Transit synthetic score: 65/100. Bike synthetic score: 81/100. Synthetic scores are illustrative for fixture shape; not authoritative; not from any real third-party scoring service.
